hero.name: Slav Hayrapetyan
hero.desc1: Building fast, SEO-optimized web experiences and AI-powered products.

about.title: About <highlight>Me</highlight>
about.body: I'm a full-stack developer and AI builder with 4 years of experience. I specialize in creating modern web applications and AI-powered systems. Currently developing <highlight>Nairi</highlight> — a platform where users generate websites, apps, and digital products from simple text prompts.
about.card1_desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js — building fast and SEO-optimized interfaces.
about.card2_desc: LLM integration, AI agents, NLP, computer vision, and automated decision systems.
about.card3_desc: From idea to deployment — creating products that bridge the gap between concept and reality.
